notes: Morning stack: 07:00 yoga → sequence drills → 08:05–10:05 two classes → more drills → wall passes last. Friday rest (yoga + half-day class only). Sat shooting / Sun running after yoga.

0.breakfast:
Oatmeal + scrambled eggs + blueberries

Prep: Cook oatmeal with milk, top with berries. Scramble 2 eggs with spinach.
0.postTraining:
Chocolate milk + orange slices

Tip: Chocolate milk is one of the best recovery drinks!
0.lunch:
Grilled chicken breast + brown rice + steamed broccoli

Plate: 4oz chicken, 1 cup rice, 1 cup broccoli
0.dinner:
Baked salmon + sweet potato + asparagus

Prep: Bake salmon at 400°F for 12-15 min. Roast sweet potato and asparagus with olive oil.

1.breakfast:
Whole grain pancakes + Greek yogurt + strawberries

Prep: Use whole wheat pancake mix. Top with yogurt and fresh strawberries.
1.postTraining:
Protein smoothie: banana + milk + peanut butter + honey

Blend until smooth. Drink within 30 min of training.
1.lunch:
Turkey wrap: whole wheat tortilla + turkey + cheese + lettuce + tomato + hummus

Side: Baby carrots + ranch
1.dinner:
Grilled fish tacos + black beans + corn salsa

Use tilapia or cod. Serve in corn tortillas with cabbage slaw.

2.breakfast:
Scrambled eggs (3) + whole wheat toast + avocado + orange juice

Add cheese to eggs if desired. Mash avocado on toast with salt.
2.postTraining: Greek yogurt parfait: yogurt + granola + mixed berries
2.lunch:
Pasta with meat sauce + side salad

Use whole wheat pasta. Lean ground beef or turkey in sauce.
2.snack: Cheese stick + whole grain crackers + grapes
2.dinner:
Chicken stir-fry + brown rice

Stir-fry chicken with bell peppers, broccoli, snap peas. Use low-sodium soy sauce.

3.breakfast:
Smoothie bowl: banana + berries + spinach + milk + granola topping

Blend thick, pour in bowl, top with granola and sliced banana.
3.postTraining: Turkey + cheese roll-ups + crackers + apple slices
3.lunch:
Grilled chicken salad: mixed greens + chicken + tomatoes + cucumbers + feta + olive oil dressing

Add quinoa for extra carbs.
3.snack: Hummus + veggie sticks (carrots, celery, bell peppers) + pita
3.dinner:
Lean beef tacos + Spanish rice + refried beans

Use lean ground beef (93/7). Corn tortillas. Load with lettuce, tomato, cheese.

4.breakfast:
French toast (whole grain) + eggs + mixed fruit

Dip bread in egg/milk/cinnamon mixture. Top with fresh fruit, light syrup.
4.lunch:
Tuna salad sandwich on whole wheat + vegetable soup

Mix tuna with light mayo, celery, onion. Pair with low-sodium soup.
4.snack: Trail mix: nuts + dried cranberries + dark chocolate chips
4.dinner:
Baked chicken thighs + roasted potatoes + green beans

Season chicken with herbs. Roast potatoes with rosemary.

5.breakfast:
Breakfast burrito: eggs + cheese + black beans + salsa in whole wheat tortilla

Scramble eggs, add beans and cheese, wrap with salsa.
5.postTraining: Protein smoothie: strawberry + banana + Greek yogurt + milk
5.lunch:
BBQ chicken sandwich + coleslaw + baked chips

Shredded chicken with BBQ sauce on whole wheat bun.
5.dinner:
Grilled shrimp + quinoa + roasted vegetables

Marinate shrimp in garlic and lemon. Roast zucchini, peppers, onions.

6.breakfast:
Eggs benedict (lighter version) + fruit salad

Poached eggs on English muffin with Canadian bacon. Light hollandaise.
6.lunch:
Chicken quesadilla + guacamole + salsa

Whole wheat tortilla, grilled chicken, cheese, peppers. Serve with fresh guac.
6.dinner:
Roast chicken + mashed sweet potatoes + steamed spinach

Sunday roast! Season whole chicken with herbs, roast at 425°F.

sequenceSchedule.notes: a=plyometrics (Mon-Thu), g=ball mastery (Tue/Thu), b/c=coordination (Mon/Wed), e=wall passes (last daily)
